history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image shows a mobile app profile or channel page with a dark theme header and multiple UI elements and counters.

A circular avatar at the top left shows a black-and-white silhouette of a man in a suit and tie standing with one hand raised. Centered under the avatar is a profile name line in Japanese text reading “仲間 I Likk” followed by “#172360,” with two colored status buttons beneath it: a purple button with a red heart icon and the word “NARE,” and a blue-gray button with a small gray card or ticket icon and the text “Lvl. 153.” Across the middle lower area are four numeric stats labeled “3820” with “exp,” “6” with “komentar,” “41” with “bulan,” and “0” with “teman.” Near the top right there is a label that reads “Setting.” At the bottom half, there is a section showing a community or account banner with the large text “NARE I Nakama Realm” and the handle “@nare_community,” plus a circular logo badge on the right featuring colorful graphics and the word “NARE.” Under the banner, counters read “6” with “Following,” “240” with “Followers,” and “301” with “Likes.” Two large buttons appear: a gray button labeled “Message” and another gray button labeled “Following” with a dropdown indicator, alongside a circular “+” icon button on the far right.

The setting appears to be an app interface on a smartphone screen, viewed in portrait orientation, with no real-world environment visible. The top area uses a dark brown and black background with subtle graphics, while the bottom area transitions to a black banner.

Visible text includes: “Setting”, “仲間 I Likk”, “#172360”, “NARE”, “Lvl. 153”, “exp”, “komentar”, “bulan”, “teman”, “NARE I Nakama Realm”, “@nare_community”, “Following”, “Followers”, “Likes”, “Message”, “Following”. No other clear symbols beyond the UI icons and the “+” button are readable.

- The two **“360”** values appear without clear labels in the screenshot.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
